kellybweh.name: Kelly Bweh
kellybweh.description: Bwehhhh. Kelly has reviewed the current situation and decided it deserves absolutely zero approval. Logic rejected. Vibes rejected. Reality itself rejected.

kellychips.name: Kelly Chips
kellychips.description: Kelly has entered snack mode. Important operations are temporarily paused while crunchy priorities receive maximum attention.

kellycoffsesip.name: Kelly Coffee Sip
kellycoffsesip.description: Kelly slowly sips coffee while processing the chaos around her. Judgement levels are rising with every sip.

kellyconfused.name: Kelly Confused
kellyconfused.description: Kelly attempted to understand the situation. After several calculations, the result remains: ???

kellycry.name: Kelly Cry
kellycry.description: When Kelly cries, the seas roar, the winds storm, mountains tremble and distant civilizations begin preparing emergency plans. The world edges closer to destruction.

kellycute.name: Kelly Cute
kellycute.description: Kelly accidentally reached maximum adorable levels. Nearby humans may experience uncontrollable happiness.

kellydaydreaming.name: Kelly Daydreaming
kellydaydreaming.description: Kelly's mind has drifted into another dimension where responsibilities do not exist and snacks appear endlessly.

kellydead.name: Kelly Dead
kellydead.description: Kelly has stopped functioning. Cause of shutdown: excessive emotional damage, confusion, or internet stupidity.

kellydrooling.name: Kelly Drooling
kellydrooling.description: Kelly has detected something incredibly desirable. Rational thought has temporarily left the system.

kellydumbfounded.name: Kelly Dumbfounded
kellydumbfounded.description: Kelly witnessed something so unbelievable that every known law of intelligence briefly collapsed.

kellyembaress.name: Kelly Embarrassed
kellyembaress.description: Critical embarrassment levels detected. Kelly requests immediate disappearance from this timeline.

kellyenjoying.name: Kelly Enjoying
kellyenjoying.description: Kelly is genuinely enjoying this moment. Rare achievement unlocked.

kellyfight.name: Kelly Fight
kellyfight.description: Warning. Kelly has entered battle stance mode. Trash talk systems activated.

kellygigle.name: Kelly Giggle
kellygigle.description: Tiny giggles detected. Kelly is trying very hard not to laugh harder.

kellyhandraise.name: Kelly Hand Raise
kellyhandraise.description: Kelly has a question. Or perhaps a complaint. Statistically speaking, probably a complaint.

kellyheart.name: Kelly Heart
kellyheart.description: Kelly sends emotional support and maximum wholesome energy.

kellyhiding.name: Kelly Hiding
kellyhiding.description: Kelly has disappeared from public existence due to social battery depletion.

kellyidontcare.name: Kelly I Don't Care
kellyidontcare.description: Kelly looked at the problem and chose complete emotional detachment.

kellyinteresting.name: Kelly Interesting
kellyinteresting.description: Hmm... Kelly has detected suspiciously interesting information.

kellyjuice.name: Kelly Juice
kellyjuice.description: Kelly is restoring energy reserves with emergency juice supplies.

kellylaugh.name: Kelly Laugh
kellylaugh.description: Kelly laughed so hard reality briefly lost stability.

kellyoho.name: Kelly Oho
kellyoho.description: Oho? Kelly has activated premium-grade side-eye and detected incoming nonsense.

kellyok.name: Kelly OK
kellyok.description: Kelly has acknowledged your existence and approved with a tiny nod.

kellypat.name: Kelly Pat
kellypat.description: Pat pat. Kelly grants temporary emotional healing.

kellypeekaboo.name: Kelly Peekaboo
kellypeekaboo.description: Kelly has appeared unexpectedly from another dimension.

kellypinch.name: Kelly Pinch
kellypinch.description: Kelly has selected violence. Tiny violence.

kellypolice.name: Kelly Police
kellypolice.description: Kelly Police arrived after detecting suspicious levels of nonsense.

kellypopcorn.name: Kelly Popcorn
kellypopcorn.description: Drama detected. Kelly has arrived fully prepared.

kellypout.name: Kelly Pout
kellypout.description: Kelly is upset and refuses to explain why.

kellysalute.name: Kelly Salute
kellysalute.description: Kelly salutes with maximum respect and dramatic energy.

kellysimping.name: Kelly Simping
kellysimping.description: Kelly has encountered something worthy of extraordinary admiration.

kellysleeping.name: Kelly Sleeping
kellysleeping.description: Kelly entered recharge mode. Social systems offline.

kellysob.name: Kelly Sob
kellysob.description: The crying levels have surpassed normal emotional standards.

kellythinking.name: Kelly Thinking
kellythinking.description: Kelly is processing information at dangerous speeds.

kellytired.name: Kelly Tired
kellytired.description: Energy levels critically low. Kelly requires sleep, snacks, or emotional support.

kellyvibing.name: Kelly Vibing
kellyvibing.description: Kelly has transcended responsibilities and entered pure vibe mode.

kellywaiting.name: Kelly Waiting
kellywaiting.description: Kelly is waiting patiently. Patience reserves may expire soon.

kellywatching.name: Kelly Watching
kellywatching.description: Kelly is silently observing events unfold from the shadows.

kellywtf.name: Kelly WTF
kellywtf.description: Kelly saw something beyond human comprehension.

kellyyawn.name: Kelly Yawn
kellyyawn.description: Kelly released a legendary yawn capable of affecting nearby timelines.

kellyacting.name: Kelly Acting
kellyacting.description: Kelly is performing at maximum dramatic capacity.

kellyannoyed.name: Kelly Annoyed
kellyannoyed.description: Kelly's patience meter has entered dangerous territory.

kellyblush.name: Kelly Blush
kellyblush.description: Unexpected emotional event detected. Kelly's systems are overheating.

kellybored.name: Kelly Bored
kellybored.description: Kelly has reached maximum boredom and may start creating chaos for entertainment.
